task_description: Fix duplicate floating WhatsApp button on home page, replace AI-generated images with real Unsplash images in home page sections, and improve footer layout and mobile responsiveness.

verification.summary: TypeScript compilation passes cleanly. ESLint passes (only pre-existing warnings in unrelated files). Full build compilation succeeds. Pre-existing runtime errors in admin pages (missing Supabase credentials) and API routes (missing Resend API key) are unrelated to our changes.
